news.title:
Federal Bank sees 12.2% surge in derivatives open interest, indicating market activity.
Stock fell 5.2% in two days, underperforming sector by 2% on March 4, 2026.
news.summary:
Federal Bank sees 12.2% surge in derivatives open interest, indicating market activity.
Stock fell 5.2% in two days, underperforming sector by 2% on March 4, 2026.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
Federal Bank may see USD 454M (Rs 41.3B) inclusions via MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February adjustment is expected to impact Federal Bank's valuation.
news.summary:
Federal Bank may see USD 454M (Rs 41.3B) inclusions via MSCI rejig.
The MSCI February adjustment is expected to impact Federal Bank's valuation.

news.title:
Federal Bank informed about its participation in IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference on Feb 25, 2026.
The bank held meetings with notable investors like ABRDN Group, HDFC ERGO, and SBI Mutual Fund; no presentations were made.
news.summary:
Federal Bank informed about its participation in IIFL's 17th Enterprising India Global Investors Conference on Feb 25, 2026.
The bank held meetings with notable investors like ABRDN Group, HDFC ERGO, and SBI Mutual Fund; no presentations were made.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Federal Bank to receive Rs 686 crore tax refund, boosting Q4 profitability.
Refund pertains to AY 2011-14, with past Q3 earnings at Rs 1,041 crore.
news.summary:
Federal Bank to receive Rs 686 crore tax refund, boosting Q4 profitability.
Refund pertains to AY 2011-14, with past Q3 earnings at Rs 1,041 crore.

news.title:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.
news.summary:
Waaree Energies plans ₹8,000 crore battery facility; ABB India Q4 revenue rose 5.7% YoY to ₹3,557 crore, net profit fell 18% to ₹433 crore.
Karur Vysya Bank cuts 1-yr MCLR to 9.1%; Federal Bank gets ₹686 crore tax refund; Texmaco-RVNL JV to enhance rail manufacturing capabilities.

news.title:
Federal Bank received IT Dept orders on Feb 18, 2026, based on ITAT decision.
The bank is set to receive a refund of ₹686.3 crore for AY 2011-14 with interest.
news.summary:
Federal Bank received IT Dept orders on Feb 18, 2026, based on ITAT decision.
The bank is set to receive a refund of ₹686.3 crore for AY 2011-14 with interest.

news.title: Federal Bank Ltd disclosed under SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.
news.summary: Federal Bank Ltd disclosed under SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011.

news.title:
Federal Bank's board approved issuing 27.3 crore warrants to Asia II Topco XIII at Rs.227 each.
Total consideration is Rs.6,196 crore, with 25% amount received at allotment.
news.summary:
Federal Bank's board approved issuing 27.3 crore warrants to Asia II Topco XIII at Rs.227 each.
Total consideration is Rs.6,196 crore, with 25% amount received at allotment.

news.title:
RBI allows ICICI entities to hold up to 9.95% stake in Federal Bank.
Approval is subject to compliance with Banking Regulation Act and other laws.
news.summary:
RBI allows ICICI entities to hold up to 9.95% stake in Federal Bank.
Approval is subject to compliance with Banking Regulation Act and other laws.

news.title:
Federal Bank intimates details of analyst/investor meets held on Feb 10, 2026.
Meetings included WCM (virtual, one-on-one) and IFC, with no presentations shared.
news.summary:
Federal Bank intimates details of analyst/investor meets held on Feb 10, 2026.
Meetings included WCM (virtual, one-on-one) and IFC, with no presentations shared.

news.title:
Federal Bank Ltd records a 13.1% rise in open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite the surge, the stock underperformed its sector with short-term price decline.
news.summary:
Federal Bank Ltd records a 13.1% rise in open interest, indicating active trading.
Despite the surge, the stock underperformed its sector with short-term price decline.

news.title:
RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to acquire up to 9.99% stake in Federal Bank.
Approval subject to compliance with Banking Regulation Act and other applicable laws.
news.summary:
RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to acquire up to 9.99% stake in Federal Bank.
Approval subject to compliance with Banking Regulation Act and other applicable laws.

news.title:
Banks' Q4 NIM likely to stay range-bound due to RBI's 25 bps repo cut transmission.
MCLR-linked loans to reprice with a lag, creating possible downward bias in margins.
news.summary:
Banks' Q4 NIM likely to stay range-bound due to RBI's 25 bps repo cut transmission.
MCLR-linked loans to reprice with a lag, creating possible downward bias in margins.

news.title:
Banks' LCR dipped in Q3 due to slow deposit growth and high funding needs; HDFC Bank's LCR fell to 116, Federal Bank to 124, and Union Bank to 123.6.
Credit grew 14.5% while deposits rose 12.7% as banks liquidated SLR for credit growth; revised RBI norms to aid LCR management from April.
news.summary:
Banks' LCR dipped in Q3 due to slow deposit growth and high funding needs; HDFC Bank's LCR fell to 116, Federal Bank to 124, and Union Bank to 123.6.
Credit grew 14.5% while deposits rose 12.7% as banks liquidated SLR for credit growth; revised RBI norms to aid LCR management from April.

news.title:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.
news.summary:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.

news.title:
Federal Bank released the earnings call transcript for Q3 FY25 on its website.
The transcript covers consolidated and standalone unaudited financial results.
news.summary:
Federal Bank released the earnings call transcript for Q3 FY25 on its website.
The transcript covers consolidated and standalone unaudited financial results.

news.title:
Federal Bank focuses on wealth management, targeting mass affluent with organic and inorganic expansion. Margins and returns are improving, supported by better asset mix and CASA ratio.
Federal Bank reported a 9.1% rise in net interest income to ₹2,653 crore in Q3FY26. Blackstone proposed a 9.99% stake, and the bank raised its stake in Ageas Federal to 30%.
news.summary:
Federal Bank focuses on wealth management, targeting mass affluent with organic and inorganic expansion. Margins and returns are improving, supported by better asset mix and CASA ratio.
Federal Bank reported a 9.1% rise in net interest income to ₹2,653 crore in Q3FY26. Blackstone proposed a 9.99% stake, and the bank raised its stake in Ageas Federal to 30%.

news.title: Federal Bank reports strong Q3 results with 19-20% YoY growth in retail gold loans.
news.summary: Federal Bank reports strong Q3 results with 19-20% YoY growth in retail gold loans.
